message.content:
@startuml
actor "./zbox sp-pay-interests" as zbox
participant "gosdk\n<<interface>>\nStakePoolPayInterests(blobberID)" as gosdk

== Initialization ==
activate zbox
zbox ->> gosdk : StakePoolPayInterests(blobberID)
deactivate zbox
activate gosdk
alt [empty blobber id]
    get client id <<internal call>> 
else []
end note right of this line 10 lines down  
create stake pool request <<external service interaction? or internal method?>>   
note over create smart contract txn data #lightgreen:green;#black:white;text-align:center;"Transaction Data Creation Phase"; end note    
send smart contract tx value fee to network nodes via RPC calls etc...  

@enduml
